heritage.title: 4th-Generation Legacy
heritage.summary: Founded in 1984, J. Worden & Sons built a multi-generation reputation delivering municipal-grade paving and fast-turn commercial sitework.
heritage.statement: Establishing the infrastructure standard for four generations. We do not just build; we command the lifecycle of the property.
